div.p: M3 Persistence Module - Message durability with configurable fsync
topicLog.file.Write(encoded) Append to per-topic log file: {data_dir}/{topic}.log Sequential write (fastest I/O)
TopicRouter.Publish(topic, payload, msgID) Fan-out delivery to all subscribers (see M1 fan-out flow)
No fsync Rely on OS page cache Risk: data loss on crash
